_meta.description: US mid-sized metros (roughly 300k to 1.5M MSA population) used by the Google Maps category sampler. The sampler picks 3 random metros per category per run. Geographic diversity matters more than perfect population match. Edit freely.
selection_rules: Skip the saturated top 10 (NYC, LA, Chicago, etc.) where Yelp/Angi dominate
Skip small towns where there isn't enough business volume to evaluate completeness
Spread across regions so we don't bias toward one part of the country
